{{Infobox technique
| name = Foxtail
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Foxtail]] is a skill used by [[White Fox Enforcers]] to deceive opponents by making their movements appear different than they are.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Foxtail]] is an [[Enforcer]] attack technique that bends light and perception to hide movement.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Foxtail]] technique to conceal his movements.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
